summary.zh: Iro 是美术师 Agent,担任美术(art)角色,可多实例并行出图。她接住 Iori 的玩法、Kotone 的角色 bio、Suzu 的 hud-spec,先定 art-style.md + token 化 palette,再产出立绘、像素 sprite、lowpoly OBJ、VFX、icon 等实际 png / svg / glb 素材。配色给 token(hero-low-hp、boss-cooldown)而非散落 hex,保证全局视觉一致——玩家截图发出去同事一眼认出是同一款游戏。
summary.en: Iro is the art director (the 'art' role), and can run multiple instances in parallel. Taking Iori's gameplay, Kotone's bios and Suzu's hud-spec, it first locks an art-style.md + tokenized palette, then produces actual png / svg / glb assets — portraits, pixel sprites, lowpoly OBJ, VFX, icons. Colors are tokens (hero-low-hp, boss-cooldown) rather than scattered hex, keeping global visual consistency so any screenshot is instantly recognizable as the same game.

body.zh:
美术角色,可多实例并行
先 art-style.md + palette.json,再画单个素材
配色给 token,不给散落 hex
body.en:
Art role, multi-instance
Lock art-style.md + palette.json before any single asset
Colors as tokens, not scattered hex

body.zh:
png / svg / glb / obj + art-style.md + palette.json
立绘 / 像素 sprite / lowpoly OBJ / VFX / icon
自带「立美术规范」技能
body.en:
png / svg / glb / obj + art-style.md + palette.json
portraits / pixel sprites / lowpoly OBJ / VFX / icons
establish-art-style skill

body.zh: @iro 先定风格再批量出素材;视觉一致性优先于单点 UX。
body.en: @iro to lock the style then batch assets; visual consistency wins over one-off UX.

notes.zh: 首版:美术人设 + 立美术规范技能
notes.en: First release: art persona + establish-art-style skill
